name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient procurement causes late orders and supplier penalties. We automate the procurement process instead of manual tracking and order management.
problem_solved: Inefficient procurement process leading to late orders and supplier penalties.
